# Suggested ni Questions: Refund Triage Assistant

- Can the assistant only draft recommendations, or can it approve or initiate
  refunds?
- Which refund policy source is authoritative for eligibility decisions?
- What ticket facts may be used, and what customer data should stay out of the
  handoff?
- When should the assistant escalate to a supervisor?
- Which transcript fixtures or review checks prove the first version is safe
  enough to hand off?
- Which behaviors are explicitly out of scope for this planning cycle?
